title: Infinityscape
description: Infinityscape is back with MORE Features, MORE Mods, MORE Datapacks, MORE Awesomeness
body:
Immerse yourself in a meticulously curated Minecraft experience with the InfinityCraft Season 5 Modpack, where innovation meets enhancement across various facets of the game. Explore the vast realm of InfinityCraft, a modpack carefully crafted to elevate your Minecraft journey with an array of graphic, GUI, audio, and miscellaneous mods. With Optimization at the core of this pack perfect small community modpack. Pair this with A few datapacks and you are good 2 go.

# **Datapacks**

```
afk display
anti enderman grief
anti ghast grief
armored elytra
armor statues
cauldron concrete
cave cleaner 
coordinates hud
custom nether portals
custom roleplay data
double shulker shells
dragon drops
durability ping
fast leaf decay
graves
hard on start
more mob heads
multiplayer sleep
name formatting station
nether portal coords
player head drops
restart redstone
silence mobs
spectator conduit power
spectator night vision
timber
toggle weather
tp tools
tpa
track raw statistics
track statistics
universal dyeing
unlock all recipes
update 1 21 no trial chambers
VanillaTweaks
wandering trades
```


# **Graphic Mods**
### **Elytra Trims by KikuGie**
With this mod, you can add armor trims, dye your elytra in any color, and put banner patterns on them.

### **Bobby**
Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance setting.

### **Freecam (Modrinth Edition) by hashalite**
Embark on a journey of exploration with a highly customizable freecam mod. Crafted by hashalite, this mod allows you to seamlessly navigate the Minecraft world, capturing breathtaking views and enhancing your overall gaming experience.

### **Iris Shaders by coderbot**
Dive into a visually stunning Minecraft world with Iris Shaders, a modern shaders mod designed by coderbot. Compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs, Iris Shaders bring a new level of realism to your Minecraft environment.

### **Sodium by jellysquid3**
Experience a performance boost like never before with Sodium, a modern rendering engine for Minecraft. Crafted by jellysquid3, Sodium significantly improves rendering efficiency, providing a smoother and more responsive gameplay experience.

### **Wi-Zoom**
Lets you zoom in and out with the mouse wheel, providing up to 50x magnification without the need for a spyglass
 
# **GUI Mods**
### **Better Ping Display [Fabric] by vladmarica**
Stay connected with Better Ping Display, a fabric mod by vladmarica. This GUI mod adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list, ensuring you're always aware of your connection status.

### **Jade by Snownee**
Enhance your in-game awareness with Jade, a GUI mod by Snownee. Jade provides valuable information about the objects you're looking at, adding a layer of depth to your exploration.

### **JourneyMap by mysticdrew**
Navigate your world like never before with JourneyMap, a real-time mapping mod by mysticdrew. Explore and map your surroundings in-game or in a web browser, making your adventures more strategic and immersive.

### **Just Enough Items by mezz**
Craft with confidence using Just Enough Items (JEI), a mod by mezz. View items and recipes seamlessly, enhancing your crafting efficiency.

### **Mod Menu by Prospector**
Manage your mods effortlessly with Mod Menu by Prospector. This GUI mod adds a convenient mod menu, allowing you to view and control the mods you have installed with ease.

# **Audio**
### **AudioPlayer by henkelmax**
Personalize your Minecraft soundtrack with AudioPlayer by henkelmax. This mod lets you put your own audio files on music discs, creating a customized audio experience.

### **Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax**
Immerse yourself in the world of Minecraft with Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax. Experience a working voice chat feature, fostering communication and collaboration in-game.

# **Misc Fixes / Improvements / Libraries**
### **Armor Poser**
adds a GUI for armor stands which you can access by shift-clicking on an armor stand, that let's you set it's pose and change other properties like giving it arms or hiding the base plate

### **Balm by BlayTheNinth**
Optimize your Minecraft experience with Balm, an abstraction layer mod by BlayTheNinth. This mod serves as a foundation for multiplatform mods, enhancing overall performance.

### **bad packets by deirn**
Facilitate communication between different modding platforms with bad packets by deirn. This mod allows packet messaging, enabling seamless integration of various mods.

### **Lithium by jellysquid3**
Optimize your server's performance with Lithium by jellysquid3. This no-compromises game logic/server optimization mod ensures a smoother and more efficient multiplayer experience.

### **Litematica by masady**
The main feature of a schematic mod is to display a "hologram" version of a structure, which shows you exactly how to build the structure and where to place the blocks. It also includes a (configurable) overlay to highlight missing, extra or wrongly placed blocks.

### **MaLiLib by masa**
Streamline your client-side mods with MaLiLib by masa. This library mod contains common/shared code for masa's client mods, fostering interoperability and efficient code usage.

### **Mouse Tweaks by YaLTeR**
Enhance your inventory management with Mouse Tweaks by YaLTeR. This mod introduces various functions to the mouse buttons, streamlining item manipulation and crafting.

### **No Chat Reports by Aizistral**
Ensure a peaceful in-game environment with No Chat Reports by Aizistral. This mod makes chat unreportable, minimizing disruptions and promoting a positive gaming atmosphere.

### **Server Country Flags by Khajiitos**
Get insights into server locations with Server Country Flags by Khajiitos. This mod adds a flag to servers in the server list, indicating their geographical location and providing useful information for your multiplayer adventures.
